job_title: Senior Web Project Manager & Marketing Strategist
company: Charly Agency (A boutique digital design and growth agency that specializes in providing high-quality brand strategy, web design, e-commerce, and conversion rate optimization (CRO) services to drive business success. They build websites, apps, and brand assets that vastly improve sales, primarily using technologies such as Webflow, Framer, Shopify, and WordPress.)
key_responsibilities: Lead website, e-commerce, and landing page design/development projects end-to-end (from strategy, design, copy, build, to launch).
Manage and coordinate client digital projects built on platforms like Figma, Webflow, Shopify, WordPress, and Framer.
Act as the primary, client-facing point of contact, ensuring high responsiveness, exceptional service, and direct communication.
Incorporate conversion rate optimization (CRO) and brand strategy discipline into website design to maximize lead generation and sales.
Oversee project deliverables, timelines, and milestones, maintaining full project ownership and transparent client management.
required_skills: Approximately 10 years of experience in web strategy, project management, or a related digital agency role.
Perfect, near-native professional English (both written and spoken) for client communication and presentation.
Strong, client-facing communication mindset with a high sense of service and professional ownership.
Hands-on or leadership experience managing website and digital projects built with Figma, Webflow, Shopify, WordPress, or Framer.
Familiarity with digital marketing strategy, conversion rate optimization (CRO), UX/UI design, and branding concepts.
recommended_search_queries: "Senior Web Project Manager" AND (Webflow OR Framer OR Shopify)
